summary: Frontend design testing for Koora Voice (صوت الكورة) app. Verified new design implementation including glassmorphism effects, lime (#CCFF00) color scheme, animated backgrounds, and RTL Arabic layout across ThreadsPage, MessagesPage, ProfilePage, and BottomNavigation.

threads_page_design: Header with glassmorphism (bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/5)
Tabs 'لك' and 'المتابَعون' with lime indicator (#CCFF00) under active tab
Stories section at top with proper styling
Thread cards with RTL layout (avatar on right)
Action buttons: Like (red when active), Repost (lime), Reply (blue)
composer_modal_design: 'الجميع يمكنهم الرد' with globe icon in lime color
Image and video buttons in lime color (#CCFF00)
'نشر' (Post) button with lime background and black text
messages_page_design: Animated background orbs (2 blur-3xl elements with lime/emerald colors)
Conversation list with user avatars and online indicators
Online indicator: lime green dot with ring-2 ring-[#0A0A0A]
Search and UserPlus buttons in header with lime color
chat_view_design: Header with glassmorphism showing user name and avatar
Animated online indicator with scale animation
Empty state with sparkle icon and 'ابدأ المحادثة'
Send button with lime background (#CCFF00) and shadow glow
Back arrow pointing right (correct for RTL)
profile_page_design: Glowing avatar frame with gradient border (blur-md opacity animation)
Multiple frame color options (lime, cyan, purple, amber, rose, rainbow)
Username with crown icon for special users
Four tabs: منشوراتي, إعجاباتي, إعادة نشر, ردودي
'تعديل الملف الشخصي' button with lime gradient
bottom_navigation_design: Top border glow (bg-gradient-to-r from-transparent via-lime-500/50 to-transparent)
Active tab indicator: lime glow bar at top
Active icon with lime color and glow effect (drop-shadow-[0_0_8px_rgba(163,230,53,0.8)])
RTL support with flex-row-reverse when isRTL=true
rtl_and_arabic: 26+ elements using Arabic fonts (Cairo for headings, Almarai for body)
Flex layouts respect RTL (avatars on right, content on left)
Back arrow points right (correct for RTL navigation)

critical_code_review_comments: ThreadsPage.js: Correctly implements glassmorphism header with bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-xl
ThreadsPage.js: Tab indicator uses #CCFF00 with glow shadow as per design guidelines
MessagesPage.js: ChatBackground component creates animated orbs with blur-3xl
MessagesPage.js: Chat bubbles use gradient from-[#CCFF00] to-emerald-500 for sent messages
ProfilePage.js: GlowingAvatar component implements animated glow ring with blur-md
ProfilePage.js: Frame color selector allows customization (lime, cyan, purple, amber, rose, rainbow)
BottomNavigation.js: Implements glassmorphism with gradient background and lime active indicators
All components use data-testid attributes for testing
Arabic fonts (Cairo, Almarai) properly applied throughout
context_for_next_testing_agent: Design overhaul testing complete. All new design elements verified: glassmorphism headers, lime (#CCFF00) color scheme, animated background orbs, glowing avatar frames, RTL Arabic layout. ThreadsPage, MessagesPage, ProfilePage, and BottomNavigation all match design_guidelines.json specifications. No issues found.
